Event: Royal Challenge - Season 23
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A129
Savage's Talisman

Triggers: Once in a while

A snowstorm breaks out on the battlefield. The storm lasts for 5 sec. During this time, 2 random enemies take magic damage equal to 5% of their max health every second. Also during this time, 2 random enemies are frozen for 1 sec every second. While frozen, the units are unable to move or attack for 1 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the targets’ gear abilities and artifact abilities are increased by 1 sec. Also during the snowstorm, whenever an enemy is frozen, the artifact owner deals magic damage equal to 5% of the frozen unit’s max health to that unit and all enemies in a small radius around the frozen unit.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
